summary: Iteration 185: Tested Vendor Intelligence + Deep Learning Integration - All backend APIs (13 tests) passed. Frontend Vendor Intelligence page loads with Maturity column and detail panel with deep learning sections.

issues: Maturity column shows '-' for all vendors because vendor_no in profiles doesn't match deep learning data vendor_no. ANCH has deep learning data but is stored under 'ANCH' vendor_no while vendor intelligence profile has 'ANCHOR GLASS CONTAINER CORP' as vendor_no.

action_items: Consider normalizing vendor_no between vendor_intelligence_profiles and deep_learning data to show maturity scores in the table
critical_code_review_comments: The VendorIntelligencePage.js correctly fetches maturity data for visible vendors using vendor_no, but the vendor_no values in vendor_intelligence_profiles don't always match the vendor_no used in deep learning collections. This is a data consistency issue, not a code bug.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Vendor Intelligence tab loads, Maturity column present, Detail panel with deep learning sections working)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Intelligence page is at Settings > Vendor Intelligence tab. ANCH vendor has deep learning data (maturity score 58, developing level). The Maturity column in the table shows '-' for all vendors because vendor_no mismatch between vendor_intelligence_profiles and deep_learning collections. When clicking on a vendor row, the detail panel opens with Extraction Profile and Deep Learning sections (data-testid='vendor-deep-learning'). Deep learning sections only show when vendor has data.

frontend_components: Settings > Vendor Intelligence tab - PASS (loads correctly)
Maturity column in vendor table - PASS (column present, shows '-' due to data mismatch)
Vendor stats grid (data-testid='vendor-stats-grid') - PASS (shows 38 vendors, 0 stable, 58% automation, 48% resolution)
Vendor row click opens detail panel (data-testid='vendor-detail-panel') - PASS
Deep Learning section (data-testid='vendor-deep-learning') - PASS (present, shows data when available)
